Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 421}You can leave vegetable seeds with Rafflesia's Paulownia Mall branch to have them grown for you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Vegetables will grow while you explore the Abyss of Time. Once you return, check to see if they're ready for harvest.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Grown vegetables will provide energy for Aigis and the rest of the team. Try growing a variety of crops to aid in your exploration of the Abyss of Time.[n]{f 1 1}
